1.title: Bytes Received
1.query:
timeseries bytes_rx = avg(dt.process.network.bytes_rx),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes_rx) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Bytes Sent
2.query:
timeseries bytes_tx = avg(dt.process.network.bytes_tx),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes_tx) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Packets Received
3.query:
timeseries rx = avg(dt.process.network.packets.rx),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(rx) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Packets Transmitted

| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)

| limit 20
